geometric_interpretation.breadth_read: The replayed live set contains four source-current branch records and three retained non-selected counterfactual branches. This strengthens breadth relative to I4/I5 without replacing them.
geometric_interpretation.claim_boundary: I5-A supports only an additive replay/control-backed provisional LC4 multi-branch candidate. It does not support LC5, LC6, AP4 bridge closeout, semantic choice, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, or ant-ecology implementation.
geometric_interpretation.short_read: I5-A confirms that the four-branch I4-A collapse is replay-stable at artifact, snapshot/load, and duplicate-run levels.
geometric_interpretation.what_replay_tests: Artifact replay rehashes every I4-A runtime/branch/collapse artifact. Snapshot/load replay reloads the saved pre/post LGRC9V3 states and confirms the recorded basin signatures. Duplicate replay starts from the I4-A pre-collapse snapshot, recomputes the selected branch from the loaded four-branch geometry, schedules the recomputed selected branch packet, and reproduces the collapse observables.

purpose: replay the I4-A four-branch collapse row and run local controls

replay_rows.claim_ceiling: replay/control-backed provisional LC4 multi-branch live-continuation collapse candidate pending I6 AP4 probe, I7 full control matrix, and I8 closeout; no semantic choice, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, or ant-ecology implementation
